title: Sea Vuna Football Club triumphs in business league
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Business league football clubs battled it out on the field last weekend as part of the Mossel Bay Sport and Recreation Festival.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Business league football clubs battled it out on the field last weekend as part of the Mossel Bay Sport and Recreation Festival."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Matches for the Business League Tournament took place on 21 and 22 September, with the teams from Sea Vuna Football Club (FC) and Nestlé FC battling it out in the final.","html":"Matches for the Business League Tournament took place on 21 and 22 September, with the teams from Sea Vuna Football Club (FC) and Nestlé FC battling it out in the final."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sea Vuna were crowned champions of the league following their 1-0 win against Nestlé."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Excellent football was played with the same level of sportsmanship displayed on and off the field.","html":"Excellent football was played with the same level of sportsmanship displayed on and off the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See photos here: Excellent sportsmanship displayed in Business League Tournament","html":"See photos here: Excellent sportsmanship displayed in Business League Tournament"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Matches were physically taxing, with some players competing in two games in one day.","html":"Matches were physically taxing, with some players competing in two games in one day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Besides Nestlé and Sea Vuna, teams in the tournament included Garden Route Casino, Pinnacle Point, Shell, PetroSA, Mossel Bay Municipality, Henra, Mobicast, Mikeva, Ruwacon, Taxi Rangers and Cape Karoo International.","html":"Besides Nestlé and Sea Vuna, teams in the tournament included Garden Route Casino, Pinnacle Point, Shell, PetroSA, Mossel Bay Municipality, Henra, Mobicast, Mikeva, Ruwacon, Taxi Rangers and Cape Karoo International."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Sea Vuna Football Club triumphs in business league
